zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Dinham於1295年9月14日出生在英國戴文努特維爾時，他的父親Sir Joscelin Dinham11292歲，母親Margaret Hydon24歲。他於1318年之前與Margaret Botreaux在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1332年4月14日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特福洛享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Dinham于1295年9月14日出生在英国戴文努特維爾时，他的父亲Sir Joscelin Dinham11292岁，母亲Margaret Hydon24岁。他于1318年之前与Margaret Botreaux在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1332年4月14日在英国英格兰薩默塞特福洛享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dinham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Dinham was born on 14 September 1295, in Nutwell, Devon, England, his father, Sir Joscelin Dinham, was 11292 and his mother, Margaret Hydon, was 24. He married Margaret Botreaux before 1318, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 14 April 1332, in Frome, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Dinham est né le 14 septembre 1295, à Nutwell, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir Joscelin Dinham, avait 11292 ans et sa mère, Margaret Hydon, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Botreaux avant 1318, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 14 avril 1332, à Frome, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Dinham am 14. September 1295 in Nutwell, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Joscelin Dinham 11292 und seine Mutter Margaret Hydon 24. Er hat vor 1318 in England Margaret Botreaux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 14. April 1332 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Frome, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Dinham è nato il il 14 settembre 1295 nel Nutwell, Devon, England, il suo padre, Sir Joscelin Dinham, aveva 11292 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Hydon, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Botreaux prima del 1318, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 14 aprile 1332, nel Frome, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Dinhamが1295年9月14日にイギリスデボンヌトウエルで生まれた時，父Sir Joscelin Dinhamは11292歳，母Margaret Hydonは24歳であった。1318年以前にイギリスでMargaret Botreauxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1332年4月14日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトフロメで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Dinham(이)가 1295년 9월 14일 영국 데폰 누트웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Joscelin Dinham(은)는 11292세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Hydon(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1318년 이전 영국에서 Margaret Botreaux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1332년 4월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 프롬에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Dinham nasceu em 14 de setembro de 1295, em Nutwell, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Joscelin Dinham, tinha 11292 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Hydon, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Botreaux antes 1318, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 14 de abril de 1332, em Frome, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Dinham родился 14 сентября 1295 г. в местности нутвелл, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Joscelin Dinham было 11292 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Hydon, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Botreaux перед 1318 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 14 апреля 1332 г. в местности фром, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Dinham nació el 14 de septiembre de 1295, en Nutwell, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Joscelin Dinham, tenía 11292 años y su mamá, Margaret Hydon, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Margaret Botreaux antes de 1318, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 14 de abril de 1332, en Frome, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 36 años.
